privileged_info_summary: Verified that the forensic case name must be 'Directory_Profile_2024' with case number 'INV-DSP-007'. The input disk image is expected at '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The output report files must be written to '/home/ga/Reports/directory_tree.txt' and '/home/ga/Reports/organization_profile.txt'. The task utilizes real forensic test data from DFTT or NIST CFReDS if available.
